leads.pain_point: Bank reconciliation takes excessive follow-up time with other team members to fix transaction errors
leads.paciolus_solution: Automated transaction matching and exception management reduces manual rework
leads.raw_quote: Two hours doing reconciliations, 10 hours following up to get others to fix wrong transactions
